title: Dungeon Lurker's crunchy, grimey pixel art hides a metatextual secret beneath its roguelike, dungeon crawling veneers
contents_preview: Dungeon crawlers conceptually appeal to me as a genre, but I've never quite found one that I've entirely clicked with.
